title: Catholic Leaders Barred From Jerusalem Holy Site on Palm Sunday
summary_full: Israeli police stopped clergymen from celebrating the Palm Sunday Mass at the Church of the Holy Sepulcher “for the first time in centuries,” church officials said.
summary_public: Israeli police stopped clergymen from celebrating the Palm Sunday Mass at the Church of the Holy Sepulcher “for the first time in centuries,” church officials said.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israeli police stopped clergymen from celebrating the Palm Sunday Mass
